id_format.parent_derivation: Strip trailing letter from sub-task ID

line_syntax._comment: These patterns must match src/core/tasks/task-reader.js parser regexes exactly
line_syntax.task_line: - [ ] TNNN description text | traces: FR-001, AC-001-01
line_syntax.task_complete: - [X] TNNN description text | traces: FR-001, AC-001-01
line_syntax.sub_task_line: - [ ] TNNNA description text | traces: FR-001, AC-001-01
line_syntax.sub_task_complete: - [X] TNNNA description text | traces: FR-001, AC-001-01
rules: Sub-lines use 2-space indent with NO dash prefix
File paths have NO backticks — plain text only
blocked_by and blocks values wrapped in square brackets
Parent task IDs are T followed by 3 digits: T001
Sub-task IDs append a single letter: T001A, T001B
Header SLUG must be a single word matching \w+ (no hyphens in first word)
Sub-tasks are created at runtime by phase agents via addSubTask()
Parent tasks auto-complete when all sub-tasks are marked [X]
